# Gateco

> Permission-aware retrieval layer for AI systems — the security middleware between AI agents and organizational knowledge.

## Links

- Full LLM context: https://gateco.ai/llms-full.txt
- Documentation: https://gateco.ai/docs
- OpenAPI spec: https://gateco.ai/openapi.json
- API base URL: https://api.gateco.dev

## Install

```bash
# Python
pip install gateco-sdk

# TypeScript
npm install @gateco/sdk
```

## Quick Start (Python)

```python
from gateco_sdk import GatecoClient

with GatecoClient("https://api.gateco.dev") as client:
    client.login("user@company.com", "password")
    result = client.retrievals.execute(
        connector_id="conn_abc",
        principal_id="user_123",
        query_vector=[0.1, 0.2, 0.3],
        top_k=10,
    )
    for item in result.results:
        print(item.vector_id, item.score)
```

## Core Concepts

- **Connectors** — Connections to vector databases (pgvector, Pinecone, Qdrant, Weaviate, Milvus, Chroma, OpenSearch, Supabase, Neon).
- **Policies** — Access rules (RBAC, ABAC, REBAC) evaluated at every retrieval. Deny-by-default. Rule conditions require `resource.` or `principal.` field prefixes.
- **Secured Retrievals** — Permission-checked queries that enforce all active policies against the requesting principal.
- **Principals** — Identities requesting access: users, service accounts, or AI agents.
- **Gated Resources** — Vector data with security metadata: classification, sensitivity, domain, ownership.
- **Readiness Levels (L0-L4)** — Semantic security posture per connector, from unconnected (L0) to chunk-level enforcement (L4).

## Plan Tiers

| Plan | Retrievals/mo | Connectors | Price |
|------|---------------|------------|-------|
| Free | 100 | 1 | $0/mo |
| Pro | 10,000 | 5 | $49/mo |
| Enterprise | Unlimited | Unlimited | $199/mo |
